name: J1939ILSetMsgRawData
title: J1939ILSetMsgRawData
syntax: long J1939ILSetMsgRawData(dbMsg msg, long dataSize, byte data[] ); // form 1
long J1939ILSetMsgRawData(dbNode node, dbMsg msg, long dataSize, byte data[] ); // form 2
long J1939ILSetMsgRawData(dbMsg msg, long dataSize, char data[] ); // form 3
long J1939ILSetMsgRawData(dbNode node, dbMsg msg, long dataSize, char data[] ); // form 4
long J1939ILSetMsgRawData(dbMsg msg, pg * pgData ); // form 5
long J1939ILSetMsgRawData(dbNode node, dbMsg msg, pg * pgData ); // form 6
description: Sets the data bytes of the message. The length of the parameter group is adjusted to size of parameter dataSize.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: message name from database, must be assigned to the node as Tx message

parameters.name: pgData
parameters.description: data and DLC are taken from this parameter group

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
